offers.name: Hogwarts Legacy: Digital Deluxe Edition
offers.note: Base game plus Dark Arts digital content; no other game included.

offers.name: FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH Digital Deluxe Edition
offers.note: Rebirth plus its Digital Deluxe upgrade; Twin Packs are intentionally excluded.

offers.name: Monster Hunter Rise + Sunbreak
offers.note: Base game plus its Sunbreak expansion.

offers.name: Monster Hunter Rise + Sunbreak Deluxe
offers.note: Base game, Sunbreak expansion, and both Deluxe kits.

offers.name: Monster Hunter Rise - DLC Collection
offers.note: Cosmetic DLC collection; requires the base game.

offers.name: Monster Hunter Rise: Sunbreak - DLC Collection
offers.requiredPageText: requires the base game and its expansion
offers.note: Cosmetic DLC collection; requires the base game and Sunbreak.

offers.name: Mortal Kombat 11 Ultimate
offers.note: Base game plus its Aftermath expansion and Kombat Packs; the Injustice bundle is excluded.

offers.name: Disney Dreamlight Valley - Wishblossom Ranch Edition
offers.note: Base game plus its Wishblossom Ranch expansion.

offers.name: Disney Dreamlight Valley - Ultimate Edition
offers.note: Base game plus its Storybook Vale and Wishblossom Ranch expansions.
